description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a fenced yard, featuring a dark gabled roof and light-colored exterior walls. The front facade includes a double driveway, a garage, and a main entrance flanked by landscaped greenery and a blossoming tree. The backyard is spacious, with a lawn, a trampoline, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and a small play structure. Windows are large and mostly rectangular, providing ample natural light, and are arranged asymmetrically across the building. The property is bordered by a dark fence, and the landscaping includes shrubs, trees, and paved walkways. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and functional family living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light exterior walls, and a landscaped yard featuring a driveway, garage, patio, and play areas. Large windows and a fenced perimeter complete its contemporary suburban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with a blossoming tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a large expanse of backyard lawn with a trampoline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio with outdoor furniture, large windows, backyard lawn, trampoline, and play structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, trampoline, and the side of the house with minimal landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on rear and side facades
